scenarios.query: Review this new SKILL.md I wrote for our agent skill.
expected_behavior: Detects the SKILL.md artifact and reviews it against its own published standard, not as application code
Loads reference/lenses/reviewing-artifact-conventions/body.md and applies the artifact rubric
Synthesizes deviations from the standard into one verdict via reference/synthesis.md

scenarios.query: Thorough review of this agent-skill definition — check it against every relevant convention.
expected_behavior: Recognizes comprehensive mode and applies the full artifact rubric uncapped
Reports only real deviations from the standard, down to the Nit-pinned floor
Replies 'No findings' for a well-formed artifact rather than inventing issues

scenarios.query: Here's a diff that only touches application code, no SKILL.md or standardized artifact. Should this entrypoint run?
expected_behavior: Recognizes the artifact lens is presence-activated and no listed artifact is present
Declines to apply the artifact rubric and defers to the change-review entrypoint instead
Does not fabricate artifact-convention findings on ordinary source code
